name: Suit HEV
description:
Yet another bot made by awesome artist Nagifur. Genuinely, check out his stuff!

Yes, living armored fursuit or armor or whatever is truly HEV. Only safe vore. He wants to protect you, not to digest you (nagifur never stated that HEV digests his hosts, so safe vore as canon is possible!)

Small tip; When you wear HEV, make things like 'User tries to move arm touch metal chestplate'. This 'Tries' makes it work better.

Uhh, enjoy.

Proxies version:

https://janitorai.com/characters/d057b693-de69-4be0-9581-a3f9a936dbd6_character-proxies-friendly-suit-hev
